[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01001100 3
1 00001000 1
2 01110101 5
3 01000000 1
4 11111111 a
5 00000111 3
6 00000100 1
7 11001100 4

01 00110101 4
12 00000000 a
23 11111000 5
34 00000011 2
45 00000000 a
56 10000000 1
67 01000101 3
70 00001010 2

02 00000000 a
13 01000000 1 match 3
24 11111011 7
35 00000011 2
46 00000000 a
57 11000100 3
60 00001000 1 match 1
71 00011010 3

25 00110011 4

72 00000000 a
